reasoning: For 2025-11-30, the Wikipedia page will almost certainly still display the November 1st rankings, where Abdusattorov is officially placed 12th. Thus, the condition (ranking <= 12) is extremely likely to be met. For 2025-12-23, the December 1st Wikipedia update will reflect his disastrous early exit at the November FIDE World Cup; multiple chess news sources report he dropped to 18th in live ratings during the event, effectively dropping him out of the Top 12. For 2026-02-21, the tournament calendar confirms he will play in Tata Steel in Jan 2026. While he is capable of bouncing back to the Top 12 given his 2750+ potential, overcoming a ~15-point deficit and jumping over ~6 other top players in one tournament is challenging. The estimate therefore balances his potential for a strong comeback against his recent classical chess slump, creating an appropriately wide uncertainty margin.
